notes: Macro success (pass@1 exact match to certified-optimal solutions, 100 hidden test tasks), first place in a statistical tie with Claude Opus 4.8 (73%; at n=100 the macro resolves ~10pp, so the gap is stated as a tie). Wilson 95% CI [65, 82], mean shaped reward 0.965, total eval cost $1,166 (highest of the field). Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 13 (slice winner), rulebook_7d 10, dedup 20 (slice winner — every partition exactly optimal), orienteering 13, gauntlet_7g 18. Pinned maximum reasoning effort; provider-default-contract appendix run scored 0.738, the smallest default-vs-max delta of the four models measured under both.

Macro success, statistical tie with Claude Fable 5 (74%) at the top of the board. Wilson 95% CI [64, 81], mean shaped reward 0.967 (the field's highest), total eval cost $605. Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 11, rulebook_7d 13 (slice winner), dedup 17, orienteering 13, gauntlet_7g 19 (slice winner). Largest positive default-to-maximum contract delta of the appendix cohort (+0.45 on matched slices).

Macro success (pass@1 exact match to certified-optimal solutions, 100 hidden test tasks). Wilson 95% CI [19, 36], mean shaped reward 0.704, total eval cost $286. Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 0, rulebook_7d 1, dedup 12, orienteering 2, gauntlet_7g 12. Ended 34% of episodes at budget exhaustion — the field's highest rate, disclosed under the benchmark's >15% prominent-disclosure rule; budget exhaustion is scored as an outcome, not excluded.

Top open-weights model and third overall — beats every closed model measured from OpenAI, Google, and xAI, landing 11 points behind the two-way Claude tie and inverting launch-week 'Kimi for capability, GLM for price' verdicts. Wilson 95% CI [53, 72], mean shaped reward 0.936, total eval cost $107 (85% of the leader's score at 9% of the bill). Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 4, rulebook_7d 11, dedup 17, orienteering 14 (slice winner), gauntlet_7g 17. The protocol pins maximum reasoning effort per provider, matching this Max-tier catalog entry.

Macro success for the flagship Sol tier (matching this catalog entry). Wilson 95% CI [12, 27], mean shaped reward 0.745, total eval cost $671. Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 0, rulebook_7d 0, dedup 3, orienteering 3, gauntlet_7g 12. The release's Appendix A singles Sol out: under the original tight per-turn v1.0 contract it solved 19/20 dedup seeds, but given the large announced episode budget with no truncation nudges it spent the budget refining and failed to lock in answers (-0.28 default-to-maximum delta on matched slices, the only negative in the cohort).

Lowest macro success on the board despite a mean shaped reward (0.728) within 0.02 of GPT-5.6 Sol's — 7% of its episodes ended at 95%+ solution quality without reaching the certified optimum ('answers look finished but usually aren't'; a goal-satisfaction benchmark would rank it several places higher). Wilson 95% CI [5, 16], total eval cost $196, 0.7% budget-exhaustion rate. Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 0, rulebook_7d 0, dedup 7, orienteering 1, gauntlet_7g 1. Serving note from the release: 5 of 5,509 turns overran the 64k per-turn request cap (one reaching 499,996 tokens), producing the only episode in the published record to exceed the episode budget's structural bound, scored as-is under the anytime contract (reward 0).

Macro success, fourth overall and second open-weights model — clears OpenAI's flagship GPT-5.6 Sol (18%) but lands far behind GLM-5.2 (63%), inverting launch-week leaderboard verdicts. Wilson 95% CI [23, 41], mean shaped reward 0.799, total eval cost $187 (1.7x GLM-5.2's run for half the score). Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 0, rulebook_7d 1, dedup 8, orienteering 9, gauntlet_7g 13. First-party serving lane worked through two documented serving-layer defects under the fail-closed gate, storm history disclosed per-row; 11% budget-exhaustion rate, all of it on the npp slice and none on macro rows.

Macro success — Wilson 95% CI [18, 35] statistically matches OpenAI's flagship GPT-5.6 Sol (18%, CI [12, 27]) at a fraction of the price: the whole run cost $40, the cheapest of the field. Mean shaped reward 0.713. Per-slice exact successes /20: steward_7d 0, rulebook_7d 1, dedup 13, orienteering 7, gauntlet_7g 5. 26% budget-exhaustion rate, disclosed under the benchmark's >15% prominent-disclosure rule.
